name: Sanity
description: Sanity is a composable content platform with real-time collaboration. Use this API to query content with GROQ, manage documents, upload assets, and listen to real-time content changes.

capabilities.name: documents_query_get
capabilities.description: Query documents using GROQ via GET request. Best for queries under 11KB.

capabilities.name: documents_query_post
capabilities.description: Query documents using GROQ via POST request. Use for larger queries exceeding 11KB.

capabilities.name: documents_get_by_id
capabilities.description: Retrieve one or more documents by their IDs. Returns the latest version from the content lake.

capabilities.name: documents_create
capabilities.description: Create a new document in the dataset. Optionally specify a custom document ID.

capabilities.name: documents_create_or_replace
capabilities.description: Create a document or replace it entirely if it already exists. Requires a document ID.

capabilities.name: documents_create_if_not_exists
capabilities.description: Create a document only if it does not already exist. Silently succeeds if document exists.

capabilities.name: documents_patch
capabilities.description: Patch (partially update) an existing document using set, unset, inc, dec, or diffMatchPatch operations.

capabilities.name: documents_delete
capabilities.description: Delete one or more documents by ID or by a GROQ filter query (max 10,000 documents).

capabilities.name: assets_upload_image
capabilities.description: Upload an image file to the Sanity asset pipeline. Returns an asset document with URL and metadata.

capabilities.name: assets_upload_file
capabilities.description: Upload a file (non-image) to the Sanity asset pipeline. Returns an asset document.

capabilities.name: assets_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an asset by deleting its asset document via mutations.

capabilities.name: documents_listen
capabilities.description: Subscribe to real-time document changes via Server-Sent Events (SSE). Filter changes with a GROQ query.

capabilities.name: documents_history
capabilities.description: Retrieve the transaction history for a specific document showing all changes over time.

capabilities.name: documents_export
capabilities.description: Export all documents from a dataset as newline-delimited JSON (NDJSON).

capabilities.name: documents_query_cdn
capabilities.description: Query documents via the CDN-cached endpoint for faster reads on published content.

capabilities.name: documents_mutate_transaction
capabilities.description: Execute multiple mutations atomically in a single transaction. All succeed or all fail.
